example: Gattu Chinki's winter break was over, and now they had to go to school.
Now your winter holidays are over, get out of the blankets quickly and go take a bath.
Aren't you both excited to meet them?
Both of them quickly get up fresh enough and get ready for school.
Come, I will drop you to school with me in my car.
Hey, we have a new admission.
She was a foreigner.
I heard that this girl's father got transferred from abroad.
The foreigner kid says while getting a little nervous.
Due to Lisa's American accent, even Gattu Chinki do not understand her.
Lisa pronounces Gattu's name in a fun way.
Today, first of all, I will introduce you to someone and that is Lisa.
So that she does not miss her country too much.
Everyone's parents had come to pick them up.

I've made some cupcakes. You can take these for Lisa.

Your room is so pretty.
